name: One Hour Calamari in Umido with Ramp Bruchetta
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the grill.
2. Check calamari for any cartilage and cut into 1-inch pieces.
3. Place the calamari in a 6-quart saucepan and add olive oil, garlic cloves, chilis, wine, and tomato sauce.
4. Bring to a boil, then lower the heat to a high simmer and cook for 1 hour until tender.
5. Meanwhile, place ramps on the grill until wilted, about 1 minute. Remove and allow to cool.
6. Chop cooled ramps into 1/2-inch pieces and mix with remaining oil and marjoram leaves in a bowl.
7. When calamari is tender, season with salt and pepper.
8. Place bread on the grill and toast. Remove and spoon the ramp mixture over the bread.
9. Divide the calamari among four bowls and top with bruschetta.
10. Serve.
